title: Docs Result
description: Result schema for the docs role. The docs writer updates user-facing documentation within doc_paths.

status.description: Whether documentation work finished or is blocked.

summary.description: One paragraph summary of documentation changes.

docs_updated.description: Relative paths to documentation files that were updated.

docs_created.description: Relative paths to documentation files that were newly created.

examples.summary: Updated README with new auth flow diagram and added migration guide for JWT transition.
